findings.title: readCostLog silently clears all records on corrupt JSONL line
findings.detail: src/utils/costs.ts:readCostLog wraps the entire read-and-parse operation in a single try/catch. If any line in .omc/costs.json is malformed (disk error, interrupted write, manual edit), JSON.parse throws and the outer catch returns [] — discarding all records. Budget enforcement then sees $0 spent for the sprint and cannot cap correctly, allowing unbounded token spend.
findings.fix_sketch: Move JSON.parse inside a per-line try/catch inside the .map(), skipping (and logging) unparseable lines instead of losing all records.

findings.title: Closes #0 appended to PR body for Discord-sourced tasks
findings.detail: src/pipeline/pr.ts:69 unconditionally appends `Closes #${input.task.issueNumber}` to every PR body. For Discord-sourced tasks, issueNumber is 0, producing a spurious `Closes #0` footer.
findings.fix_sketch: Wrap the Closes line with an issueNumber > 0 guard.

findings.title: Docker sandbox runs as root with bridge network — insufficient isolation
findings.detail: src/agents/verifier/sandbox.ts buildDockerArgs() passes --user root and --network bridge to every docker run invocation. Bridge gives full outbound internet access and running as root means a container escape would have host root privileges.
findings.fix_sketch: Use --user 1000:1000 and for typecheck/lint/test phases use --network none.

findings.title: setupWorktree force-removes worktree by issueNumber — collision risk on retry race
findings.detail: src/pipeline/factory.ts:setupWorktree uses issueNumber as the worktree directory key for GitHub tasks. If a task is retried while a previous run is still in-flight, setupWorktree calls `git worktree remove --force` on the existing path, killing the first run's working directory mid-execution.
findings.fix_sketch: Append the task ID to the key: `${issueNumber}-${task.id.slice(-6)}` so concurrent runs for the same issue never share a path.

findings.title: spawnCapture stdout/stderr accumulation has no size cap
findings.detail: src/repos/manager.ts:spawnCapture appends all git subprocess output to unbounded strings. The verify/spawn-util.ts sibling correctly caps output; manager.ts has no analogous guard.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a byte cap (e.g. 2 MB) mirroring spawn-util.ts.

findings.title: Module-level readFileSync for routing.json has no error handling
findings.detail: src/classifier/index.ts calls readFileSync at module load time without a try/catch — already fixed with a descriptive rethrow.

findings.title: All editor commits use generic message "chore: editor changes"
findings.detail: src/pipeline/editor.ts hardcodes `git commit -m "chore: editor changes"` for every commit the editor stage produces, making the git log uninformative.
findings.fix_sketch: Use a descriptive message derived from the task title.

findings.title: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY passed to every Claude child process — exfiltration vector via prompt injection
findings.detail: The CLAUDE_ENV_ALLOWLIST in src/workers/claude-env.ts includes ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Editor/reviewer/doctor roles receive unsanitized plan content from Architect's LLM output, creating a real prompt-injection exfiltration path. Risk accepted per existing comment.
findings.fix_sketch: Restrict ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to the anthropic-api adapter path only. Add includeApiKey?: boolean parameter to claudeChildEnv().

findings.title: Sprint tick() calls pickWorker() once per pending task in loop — redundant calls before acquire state propagates
findings.detail: In sprint.ts tick() loop, pickWorker() is called per iteration. After the first dispatch, subsequent calls return null quickly via the registry check, so behavior is correct but wasteful.
findings.fix_sketch: Call pickWorker() once before the loop and break early if null.

findings.title: Untracked TODO for audit finding stuck in verifying state
findings.detail: Superseded by AUDIT-IFleet-c4325790 which implements the actual fix.

findings.title: Codex adapter leaks tmpDir on non-zero exit
findings.detail: In src/workers/codex.ts, mkdtempSync creates a temp directory per spawn. The rmSync cleanup lives only inside the finalize handler, which runs exclusively on exit code 0. When Codex exits non-zero the tmpDir is silently orphaned, accumulating ifleet-codex-* directories in /tmp over time.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a classifyExit handler that calls rmSync(tmpDir) before returning undefined.

findings.title: Audit finding stuck in verifying on doctor-cap or editor-retry failure
findings.detail: In src/pipeline/runner.ts, maybeMarkAuditFindingVerifying flips a finding from fixing to verifying before the doctor+verify loop. All failure/cancellation paths inside that loop return early without resetting the finding back to reopened, leaving it permanently stuck in verifying.
findings.fix_sketch: Wrap the verify+doctor loop in try/finally; reset verifying→reopened in the finally block when the loop exits via failure. Implemented via maybeResetAuditFindingToReopened helper.

findings.title: Unused reposDir parameter in GitRepoManagerOptions
findings.detail: The reposDir field in GitRepoManagerOptions (src/repos/manager.ts) was documented as intentionally unread. Removed the dead field and updated all call sites.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove reposDir from GitRepoManagerOptions and all call sites.
